behavior_summary: This script defines a single U8P_TROODLE::look-type process (U8P_TROODLE::look) that runs when the NPC/object is examined. When invoked it emits one bark text "changeling " and then immediately suspends the process.
There are no menus, branches, parameters, global flag reads/writes, or external calls recorded; the routine is a minimal descriptive response for the 'U8P_TROODLE::look'/inspect interaction.
notable_control_flow: Entry on inspect/U8P_TROODLE::look triggers the process (processType 0x0208).
Sequence: Bark("changeling ") -> suspend (process halts or yields).
open_questions: Does the suspend terminate the U8P_TROODLE::look handler permanently or merely yield until some engine event resumes it? (inferred behavior only).
Is the trailing space in the bark string intentional or an artifact of extraction?
Is U8P_TROODLE::look ever called from other engine events (fast-area entry, scripts) aside from the standard U8P_TROODLE::look/inspect hook?

main_function.name: U8P_TROODLE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short descriptive response when the player inspects or looks at this NPC/object; play a single bark and then suspend further processing.
entry_conditions: Invoked on U8P_TROODLE::look/inspect event for this NPC/object (processType 0x0208).
Triggered when the player examines or targets the NPC (engine U8P_TROODLE::look interaction).

function_map.name: U8P_TROODLE::look
function_map.role: U8P_TROODLE::look/inspect handler that emits a short bark and suspends

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script defines a single U8P_TROODLE::look-type process (U8P_TROODLE::look) that runs when the NPC/object is examined. When invoked it emits one bark text "changeling " and then immediately suspends the process.
